social.text: La esperanza cristiana es invencible. Esta afirmación del papa Francisco, colmada de amor y gratitud, es la que hoy nos sostiene, nos levanta y nos impulsa a no dejar de creer ni de sembrar.

social.text: Horrible Congressman Thomas Massie put out an old Endorsement, from many years ago, of him by me long before I found out that he was the Worst Congressman in the History of our Country. I endorsed Ed Gallrein, a true American Patriot, which Massie knows full well, so the statemen
